author: aliir74
description: Cmd+C copies the actual image when an image embed is selected in source mode. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Ali Irani
manifest.description: Cmd+C copies the actual image when an image embed is selected in source mode.
manifest.name: Copy Image Hotkey

name: Copy Image Hotkey

releases.author: aliir74
releases.description:
Plugin guideline compliance pass.

- Dropped `async` modifier from `onload` (no await calls).
- Removed the `fetch`-based blob preload optimization; copy path now always reads from the Obsidian vault (fast and complies with plugin guidelines).

Functional behavior is unchanged — Cmd+C still copies the actual image when an image embed is selected in source mode or when a rendered image is clicked in Live Preview.
